title: SEC4: unwrap_throw chain in onupgradeneeded missing safety comment
description: storage.rs lines 58-65: four chained unwrap_throw() calls in the onupgradeneeded closure have no comment explaining why they are safe. Per CLAUDE.md, undocumented unwraps are bugs waiting to happen. The invariant is: inside onupgradeneeded, event.target() is always an IdbOpenDbRequest and its result() is always a valid IdbDatabase — the browser guarantees this. Without the comment a reviewer will not know whether these are safe or just optimistic. Fix: add comment before the chain: // Safety: inside onupgradeneeded, event.target() is guaranteed to be an IdbOpenDbRequest with a valid IdbDatabase result — browser invariant.
